'''vawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wonkily|wonkily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wonkily|wonkily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vawate|vawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vawatesher|vawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vawatesherĂ«m|vawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vawatero|vawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vawateshĂ«|vawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vawateshĂ«m|vawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivawatero|gokivawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivawateshĂ«|gokivawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivawateshĂ«m|gokivawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govawankerom|govawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govawankeshĂ«|govawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govawankeshĂ«m|govawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govawankeya|govawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vawaterom|vawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vawatemu|vawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vawateya|vawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivawaterom|gokivawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivawatemu|gokivawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivawateya|gokivawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vawawate|vawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vawawatesher|vawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vawawatesherĂ«m|vawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vawawatero|vawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vawawateshĂ«|vawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vawawateshĂ«m|vawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivawawatero|gokivawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivawawateshĂ«|gokivawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivawawateshĂ«m|gokivawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govawawankerom|govawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govawawankeshĂ«|govawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govawawankeshĂ«m|govawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govawawankeya|govawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vawawaterom|vawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vawawatemu|vawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vawawateya|vawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivawawaterom|gokivawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivawawatemu|gokivawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivawawateya|gokivawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠwĂŠte|vĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠwĂŠtesher|vĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠwĂŠtero|vĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠwĂŠtero|gokivĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠwĂŠnkerom|govĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠwĂŠnkeya|govĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠwĂŠterom|vĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠwĂŠtemu|vĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠwĂŠteya|vĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠwĂŠterom|gokivĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠwĂŠteya|gokivĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafwafte|vafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafwaftesher|vafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafwaftesherĂ«m|vafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafwaftero|vafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafwafteshĂ«|vafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafwafteshĂ«m|vafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafwaftero|gokivafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafwafteshĂ«|gokivafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafwafteshĂ«m|gokivafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafwafnkerom|govafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafwafnkeshĂ«|govafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafwafnkeshĂ«m|govafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafwafnkeya|govafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafwafterom|vafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafwaftemu|vafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafwafteya|vafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafwafterom|gokivafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafwaftemu|gokivafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafwafteya|gokivafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
